query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  openId VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE,
  username VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,
  passwordHash VARCHAR(255),
  name TEXT,
  email VARCHAR(320),
  loginMethod VARCHAR(64),
  role ENUM('user', 'admin', 'branch_manager', 'operations_manager', 'region_manager') DEFAULT 'user' NOT NULL,
  branchId INT,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  lastSignedIn TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS branches (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  city VARCHAR(100),
  region VARCHAR(100),
  manager VARCHAR(100),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS performance_evaluations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  employeeName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  employeeIdNumber VARCHAR(50),
  employeePosition VARCHAR(100),
  branchId INT,
  evaluationPeriod VARCHAR(50),
  totalScore DECIMAL(5,2),
  evaluationScale VARCHAR(50),
  evaluatedByManager VARCHAR(255),
  managerOpinion TEXT,
  evaluationDate TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
